name: Sweet Cider Mustard - Sl 11/95
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a container of an electric blender.
Process for 20 seconds or until smooth, stopping to scrape down the sides once.
2. Pour the mixture into a heavy saucepan.
Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly for 5 minutes or until thickened; allow it to cool completely.
3. Teri Schmid serves this mustard as a dip for pretzels.
Teri Schmid of Georgia, in November 1995 "Southern Living".
